title: Bihar CM announcement LIVE: New chief minister likely from BJP after Nitish Kumar resigns; Samrat Choudhary front runner
description: Bihar New CM announcement LIVE: Follow LIVE updates as Bihar will be picking its new CM today with Nitish Kumar likely to resign after chairing his last cabinet meeting. BJP's Samrat Choudhary is a frontrunner to become the next CM. The name will be finalised after NDA meeting at 4 pm today.
